themes.name: Myth and Ancestors
themes.description: The first fires, the old gods, and the stories we carried forward.

themes.name: Teeth
themes.description: Empires crumble, borders shift, and dogs witness what humans build and abandon.

themes.name: In Our Time
themes.description: The partnership as we know it now — ordinary and irreplaceable.

themes.name: Later, Elsewhere
themes.description: What comes next, after the familiar world loosens its grip.

stories.title: Aurignacian Night
stories.hook: A boy at the edge of firelight. A wolf-shape in the dark. The first choice.

stories.title: The Story of Shu, Kuai, Grandson-Become-Grandfather, and the Tombs That Could Not See
stories.location: Yellow River Valley, Shang Dynasty China
stories.hook: A grandfather's story. A ratter named Shu. The tomb that could not see.

stories.title: Herrengasse Elegy
stories.hook: A black Labrador. An empire collapsing. Loyalty until the end.

stories.title: Packless
stories.hook: A wagon's wheel. A stray bleeding out in the grass. The sky pulling harder.

stories.title: The Wild Hunt
stories.hook: What happens after the last breath. The Hunt rides. It was always riding for her.

stories.title: Echo
stories.hook: A man, a puppy, and the first day of everything.

stories.title: Marginalia
stories.hook: A Northumbrian hall at midwinter. A monk's sermon. A hound and a wounded rabbit.

stories.title: Anomaly at ARCESS-7
stories.hook: A dog team. A polar night. Something impossible on the ice.

stories.title: The Importance of Consistency and Attention in One Specific Canine-Human Relationship
stories.hook: A man who counts everything. A dog who learns his language.

stories.title: The Parrot's Tale
stories.hook: A parrot who remembers everything. A girl who won't stay caged. A dog made of moonlight and hunger.

stories.title: Do Better
stories.hook: A custody handover in a park. The dog is fine. They are not.

stories.title: After Snow
stories.hook: A woman, a room, a trembling chin dog. The objects that outlast us.
